title: Alternative Society Vanilla+
description: A simple vanilla+ pack built on Tectonic and Terralith
body:
**Welcome to our custom Minecraft modpack, crafted with care for small groups of friends seeking a tailored and enjoyable experience. Our modpack is designed to enhance your gameplay without straying too far from the vanilla essence you know and love.**

### **Mod Pack Content:**
Our modpack focuses on three core pillars: performance, quality of life, and enhancing the Nether and End dimensions.

### **Performance:**
We've handpicked mods that optimize your game's performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even on modest hardware configurations. Say goodbye to lag spikes and frame drops as you dive into your Minecraft adventures.

### **Quality of Life:** 
We believe in enhancing your gameplay experience without overwhelming you with complex mechanics. Our selection of quality of life mods streamlines various aspects of Minecraft, from inventory management to user interface improvements, making your journey more enjoyable and hassle-free.

### **Better Nether and End:** 
The Nether and End dimensions are rich with untapped potential, and our modpack unlocks this potential with carefully chosen mods. Discover new biomes, encounter unique creatures, and unearth valuable resources as you traverse these otherworldly realms.
